functions.name: ASK
functions.description: Calls Google Gemini model to process the provided text with optional custom settings.

parameters.name: text
parameters.description: The input text or cell reference containing prompt data.

parameters.name: systemInstruction
parameters.description: Optional: Override the default system instruction for this specific call.

parameters.name: model
parameters.description: Optional: Override the default model (e.g. gemini-2.0-flash, gemini-1.5-pro).
